name: Chicken with Garlic Cream Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. For a lighter dish, the cream can be replaced with half-and-half or left out completely.
2. Cut chicken into bite-sized pieces.
3. Combine chicken and garlic in a skillet with wine over medium heat.
4. Cook until chicken is about half done, then add broccoli and mushrooms.
5. In a saucepan, heat the heavy cream over high heat until it boils.
6. Add white pepper and remaining garlic to the boiling cream.
7. In a small bowl, mix corn starch and water. Slowly stir this mixture into the cream while cooking.
8. Continue stirring briskly and add more of the corn starch mixture until the desired thickness is reached.
9. Be cautious; the sauce will thicken slowly after adding the cornstarch, so wait before adding more.
10. Pour the sauce over the chicken and serve with pasta or rice (Angel Hair pasta works well).
11. Enjoy!
